source: SMOKE (M13): self-computed values from this port's own C++ build (core/build), NOT C#-oracle values -- M14 re-pins them against the real RMC.BestFit. Exercises the `point_process` model type (non-seasonal only -- the seasonal path is a project-wide deferral): default-constructed PointProcessModel (single-GEV competing-risks distribution), the DataFrame/AMS cascade, and the explicit threshold/total_years knobs (an explicit total_years marks the exposure explicitly set and refreshes lambda). Parameter layout: the GEV mark distribution [location, scale, shape]. LOOSE smoke tolerances (rel 1e-5; the GEV likelihood surface is flatter than the Normal cases').
